mapper.sql: item_id AS itemId, item_name AS itemName, category_code AS categoryCode, status_code AS statusCode, owner_member_no AS ownerMemberNo, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS createdAt

choose.when: ORDER BY item_name ASC, item_id ASC
ORDER BY created_at DESC, item_id DESC

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM cmn_edu_query_item WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_id), 90999) + 1 FROM cmn_edu_query_item WHERE item_id BETWEEN 91000 AND 91999
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cmn_edu_query_item ( item_id, item_name, category_code, status_code, owner_member_no, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{categoryCode}, #{statusCode}, #{ownerMemberNo}, 'Y', #{requestUser}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), #{requestUser}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE cmn_edu_query_item SET item_name = #{itemName}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, owner_member_no = #{ownerMemberNo}, updated_by = #{requestUser}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE cmn_edu_query_item SET status_code = #{statusCode}, updated_by = #{requestUser}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE cmn_edu_query_item SET use_yn = 'N', status_code = 'CLOSED', updated_by = #{requestUser}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
